narrative:
Trimble Township has 2,446 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.1 percentage points.
